chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–2370 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1.For order on Misc. No.10680/2022 (Urgent/App) 2.For order on office objection No.10 & 18 3.For order on Misc. No.10681/2022 (Exemption/App) 4.For order on Misc. No.10682/2022 (Stay/App) 5.For hearing of main case 15.04.2022 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. -------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. As per learned counsel, the Revision Application against the Impugned Ruling is pending before the Director General Valuation. He states that the petitioner is willing to secure the differential amount of duties and taxes with the Collector of Customs (Respondents No.2 and 3). Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, learned DAG present in Court, has waived notice on behalf of the respondents. In the circumstances, by way of an interim arrangement since the consignment is securing storage charges at the port, let the undisputed quantum of duties and taxes be deposited with the Collectorate/ Department and the disputed amount of the duties and taxes be secured before the Collector of Customs (Respondents No.2 and 3) by way of pay order(s) / bank guarantee in respect of the consignment(s) stipulated supra. Upon deposit of the undisputed quantum of duties and taxes with the Collectorate/Department and presentation of the certificate(s) issued by the Collector of Customs (Respondents No.2 and 3), the concerned Collectorate/Department shall release the consignment(s) forthwith. The fate of amount secured supra shall be subject to the outcome of the Revision Application pending before the Director General Valuation.

Upon deposit of the undisputed quantum of duties and taxes with the Collectorate/Department and presentation of the certificate(s) issued by the Collector of Customs (Respondents No.2 and 3), the concerned Collectorate/Department shall release the consignment(s) forthwith. The fate of amount secured supra shall be subject to the outcome of the Revision Application pending before the Director General Valuation. This petition along with pending application(s) is disposed of in the terms herein. JUDGE JUDGE SM
